title: Create a Web Server in NodeJS (Without express)
description:
Every application needs a server which can respond to the requests coming from the user. NodeJS provides some functions through HTTP module which help in creating a web server.

In this video, I have created a web server using functions like createServer() and listen() from HTTP module. The server sends JSON data as a response whenever a request is made.

Code from this video:
https://github.com/adikharadkar/http-module-node/blob/main/server.js

Learn more about HTTP module:
https://nodejs.dev/learn/the-nodejs-http-module

Take a deep drive into HTTP module:
https://nodejs.org/dist/latest-v17.x/docs/api/http.html
